title: Fáilte Skill Tree
description: A Pufferfish Skill Tree focused on Class Identity and fully compatible with RPG Series
body:
Edited Version of Pufferfishs' Default Skill Trees, the combat tree is now split into 4 different trees, resembling 4 different classes.

Requires Spell Engine and Spell Power Attributes as of version 2.0.1

- Warrior
- Assassin
- Archer
- Wizard

![Skill Tree Visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7f700d69fb8f37deb0911c671cdaef7528bdcbf.png)

Changes and Rebalances might come in the future.

Intended to be used with a Difficulty increasing Mod like Dungeon Difficulty.

Works well with **Skill Tree (RPG Series)** and **More RPG Classes - Skill Tree**.

The Main reason for this Change is that the default Skill Trees don't have any Bonuses for Spellcasters and too much Overlap between different Playstyles, now you can find Magic Damage in the Wizard Tree, making this perfectly viable for any Spellcaster.
